user_prompt: Consecrate the iron halo before cycling
prayer:
Approach the iron halo with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to bless its aureolic wards.
Anoint the iron halo's sacred rings with chrism of sacred oils, preparing for the cycling rite.
Invoke the Machine Spirit indwelling the iron halo, commanding harmonious flux.
Initiate the cycling operation whilst chanting the Canticle of Perpetual Vigilance.
Verify the iron halo's radiant purity through sanctified auspex invocation.

Reawaken its Machine Spirit with electro-incantations of righteous fury.

Monitor plasma flows and affirm the enginarium's restored equilibrium.
